'''dhanuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeibekiko|zeibekiko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeibekiko|zeibekiko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhanuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhænirith|dhænirith]] || [[word:dhænirij|dhænirij]] || [[word:dhænirish|dhænirish]] || [[word:dhæniri|dhæniri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanunuruth|dhanunuruth]] || [[word:dhanunuruj|dhanunuruj]] || [[word:dhanunurush|dhanunurush]] || [[word:dhanunuru|dhanunuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanuruth|dhanuruth]] || [[word:dhanuruj|dhanuruj]] || [[word:dhanurush|dhanurush]] || [[word:dhanuru|dhanuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanufruth|dhanufruth]] || [[word:dhanufruj|dhanufruj]] || [[word:dhanufrush|dhanufrush]] || [[word:dhanufruf|dhanufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanuruthu|dhanuruthu]] || [[word:dhanuruju|dhanuruju]] || [[word:dhanurushu|dhanurushu]] || [[word:dhanuruku|dhanuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanuruth|dhanuruth]] || [[word:dhanuruj|dhanuruj]] || [[word:dhanurush|dhanurush]] || [[word:dhanuru|dhanuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanuruthul|dhanuruthul]] || [[word:dhanurujul|dhanurujul]] || [[word:dhanurushul|dhanurushul]] || [[word:dhanurukul|dhanurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanuruthuthu|dhanuruthuthu]] || [[word:dhanurujuju|dhanurujuju]] || [[word:dhanurushushu|dhanurushushu]] || [[word:dhanuruku|dhanuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanuruthun|dhanuruthun]] || [[word:dhanurujun|dhanurujun]] || [[word:dhanurushun|dhanurushun]] || [[word:dhanurukun|dhanurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanuruthuoro|dhanuruthuoro]] || [[word:dhanurujuoro|dhanurujuoro]] || [[word:dhanurushuoro|dhanurushuoro]] || [[word:dhanurukuoro|dhanurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
